tasks.title: M2.5 — Empty Routes, Responsive, and Accessibility

bug_fixes.title: Theme toggle is not interactive in the running app
bug_fixes.root_cause: The @rendermode directive was missing from the AppThemeToggle. The layout chain was static SSR; the toggle's @onclick handler was not wired to an interactive circuit. The bUnit tests passed because they render the component in isolation under InteractiveServer (inherited from the test render context).
bug_fixes.fix: Added @rendermode InteractiveServer to AppThemeToggle.razor. The layout itself remains static for streaming SSR (the layout's @Body is a RenderFragment delegate, which cannot be serialized across the SSR → interactive boundary). The toggle is the only interactive component in the layout's tree, so declaring the directive on the toggle itself is the minimum-blast-radius fix that closes the bug.
bug_fixes.test_added: AppLayout_ThemeToggleWiringTests.cs renders the AppLayout, finds the toggle inside the topbar, clicks it, and asserts appTheme.set is invoked. This is the new bUnit test that proves the click handler is wired when the layout is rendered (not the toggle in isolation).

tasks.notes: Delivered 2026-07-11. M2.5 scope landed per the approved plan (with T-017 theme toggle fix included at user opt-in). Five sub-deliverables: (1) Empty routes — Home.razor and NotFound.razor rewritten to use AppCard + AppEmptyState with links to /dashboard and /design-system (5 new EmptyRoutesTests). (2) Responsive matrix — AppLayout.razor.css now has @media rules for the lg/md/sm breakpoints (14rem / 10rem / 8rem sidebar widths; sidebar padding / topbar padding / content padding scale down at smaller breakpoints); content area gets overflow-y: auto so it scrolls vertically; topbar remains horizontal at every breakpoint. docs/ui-principles.md § 10.1 documents the matrix with the M2.5 implementation. (3) A11y audit — KeyboardSmokeTests (4 tests), AriaCurrentInvariantTests (5 tests covering breadcrumb aria-current, NavLink active state, sidebar active link), AxeCoreAuditTests (3 tests registered but skipped per ADR-016 / M4-D). (4) T-017 fix — @rendermode InteractiveServer added to AppThemeToggle.razor (not to AppLayout.razor; the layout is a LayoutComponentBase whose @Body is a RenderFragment, which Blazor refuses to serialize across the SSR → interactive boundary; declaring the directive on the toggle itself is the minimum-blast-radius fix). (5) Project-continuity state + implementation report + per-session handoff. 18 new component tests + 3 new architecture tests (skipped) added. Branch: feature/m2-5-empty-routes-responsive-accessibility. Commit: feat(m2.5): add empty routes, responsive matrix, a11y audit, and theme toggle fix. Push skipped (no remote configured). The session does NOT implement M2.6 (only the M2.6 plan is recorded as Deferred).

tasks.title: M2.6 — M2 Closeout and Treehouse Dogfooding
tasks.notes: M2 closeout delivered 2026-07-11. Introduces the Milestone Closeout Standard at .ai/workflows/milestone-closeout.md (the canonical procedure every future milestone closeout must follow; 10 sections; the 13-section retrospective is the standard's required deliverable). Ships the M2 retrospective at retrospective-m2-application-shell-and-navigation.md (the first milestone retrospective in the repository). Validates the complete M2 milestone end-to-end: npm run css:build (0), dotnet restore (0), dotnet build (0 warnings, 0 errors), dotnet test (197 passed, 0 failed, 7 skipped per ADR-016), dotnet format --verify-no-changes (clean), visual smoke (5 routes return 200, theme toggle present on every AppLayout page). Closes M2 in .ai/state/milestones.json (status Done; closed_at 2026-07-11). Updates ROADMAP.md § 2 (M2 row Done) and § 3 (M2.6 row Delivered; M2 DoD expanded with the retrospective + the standard). Updates the master delivery plan § 1 (M2 row Done) and § 3 (M2 completion status Done; M2.6 slice row Delivered; M2 evidence list updated). Prepares the M3 plan at .ai/plans/M3-project-registration.md (Status: Awaiting Approval). The first M3 task (T-018 — M3.1) is promoted to Ready. The M2 closeout commit (chore(m2.6): close M2 with retrospective, milestone closeout standard, and M3 plan) is created on the feature branch and fast-forwarded into main. The m2 annotated milestone tag is created at the M2 closeout commit on main. The feature branch is deleted per the branching strategy. Push is skipped (no explicit authorisation in this session).

tasks.title: Theme toggle is not interactive in the running app (M2.4 follow-up bug)
tasks.links_to_capability: AppShellRegion / AppThemeToggle (shell/theme capability; the M2.1 AppShellRegion and the M2.3 AppThemeToggle form the shell/theme surface; the bug was in the interactive render seam, not in the JS contract)
tasks.fix_summary: Added @rendermode InteractiveServer to AppThemeToggle.razor. The layout itself remains static for streaming SSR (the layout's @Body is a RenderFragment delegate, which cannot be serialized across the SSR → interactive boundary; Blazor throws InvalidOperationException at request time if @rendermode is applied to a LayoutComponentBase). The toggle is the only interactive component in the layout's tree, so declaring the directive on the toggle itself is the minimum-blast-radius fix. The new AppLayout_ThemeToggleWiringTests bUnit test renders the AppLayout, finds the toggle inside the topbar, clicks it, and asserts appTheme.set is invoked; this proves the click handler is wired when the layout is rendered (not the toggle in isolation). The visual smoke test confirms every route returns 200 and the toggle's markup is present on every page.
tasks.notes: Reproduction (before fix): (1) dotnet run on http://localhost:5170. (2) Open the home page. (3) The theme toggle control is visible in the top bar's Trailing slot. (4) Click the toggle. Actual: the click does not change the document theme. Expected: the data-theme attribute changes immediately, persists across navigation, persists across refresh. After the fix, the click changes the document theme immediately, and the IIFE in App.razor persists the theme via localStorage 'app-theme'. Fixed in the M2.5 slice per the user's explicit opt-in. Branch: feature/m2-5-empty-routes-responsive-accessibility. Commit: feat(m2.5): add empty routes, responsive matrix, a11y audit, and theme toggle fix.
